_meta.audit: No shame lexicon and no verdict language anywhere. A slip is 'a slip' — data, not a verdict (brand kit §1.2). Fact first, identity preserved, agency returned. Tokens: {{bestStreak}} = archived best (human-readable), {{momentum}} = momentum % (never decreases via a slip; undo is the one sanctioned exemption). {{motivation}} = the user's chosen motivation word, echoed back — never generated by us. E4.1 addition: confirm.retryNote is the one agent-drafted line — shown only when the durable write did not persist (§9-rule-1 class: 'Logged.' is never claimed without durable bytes); calm, zero-shame, retryable, keeps the confirm stage. AWAITS OPERATOR TONE REVIEW (REVIEW.md item 3). E4.2 addition: the dashboard section — the root surface's pending-undo banner and slip-row strings, BYTE-IDENTICAL to the E4.1-shipped view literals (centralization moved the source, not the pixels; no new drafting). This file is the ONE audited slip strings table, gated by SlipLexiconTests.test_slipStrings_containNoForbiddenLexicon.
_meta.monotonic_note: Copy must never imply the streak 'reset to zero' or that progress was lost. Best-streak is archived and safe; momentum is preserved; a fresh streak simply starts now.

confirm.title: Log a slip?
confirm.body: This just records it and starts a fresh streak. Your best is kept safe.
confirm.retryNote: That didn't save just yet — nothing's lost. Tap Log it to try again whenever you're ready.

logged.title: Logged.
logged.body: Your best — {{bestStreak}} — is safe, and your momentum is still {{momentum}}. When you're ready, the next hour starts now.
logged.bodyNoBest: Logged. Your momentum is still {{momentum}}. The next hour starts whenever you're ready.

reflection.prompt: Want to note what was going on? (optional, stays on your device)

undo.undoneConfirmation: Undone. Your streak is right where it was.

encouragement: One slip is one data point, not a verdict.
Momentum is clean days over total days — a single day barely moves it.
The next hour is the only one that matters right now.
motivationEcho: You said this matters for your {{motivation}}. It still does.
